verdict_reasoning: TGOLN2 is a type II single-pass TM protein resident in the trans-Golgi network. While it bears a TM domain, that domain is embedded in the Golgi membrane, not the plasma membrane. No documented surface pool, ecto-display under stress/cell-death/cancer states, lysosomal-exocytosis pathway, or PM-cycling mechanism. No cell-surface-directed therapeutics target this protein. Canonical compartment is endomembrane (Golgi) only.
